details.title: Zewadi Buckwheat
details.description: Zewadi Buckwheat is a wholesome, naturally gluten-free grain packed with fiber, protein, and essential nutrients. It supports healthy digestion, steady energy, and overall wellness, making it a perfect choice for a balanced and healthier lifestyle.
details.fullDescription: Zewadi Buckwheat is a wholesome and naturally gluten-free superfood packed with fiber, protein, and essential nutrients that support a healthier lifestyle. It helps improve digestion, provides steady energy throughout the day, and supports heart health and balanced blood sugar levels. Rich in important minerals and plant-based nutrition, buckwheat is a great choice for everyday meals. Whether used in porridge, wraps, pancakes, salads, or traditional dishes, Zewadi Buckwheat makes healthy eating simple, tasty, and part of your daily routine.

items.title: Buckwheat Groats
items.description: Whole grain buckwheat groats for healthy meals.
